info.title: Megaventory API
info.description: A powerful business ERP software API for Inventory and Order Management, Light Manufacturing Management, and Reporting. Megaventory provides endpoints for managing products, sales orders, purchase orders, suppliers/clients, inventory locations, stock levels, and documents.

post.description: Gets information on existing products with optional filtering
Inserts a product or updates an existing one
Deletes a product by ID
Restores a previously deleted product
Gets information on existing batch numbers
Gets a product bundle and its included products
Gets all product bundles

post.summary: Insert or update a product bundle
post.description: Inserts a product bundle or updates an existing one
Removes a product bundle
Restores a deleted product bundle
Gets information on existing sales orders with optional filtering

post.summary: Insert or update a sales order
post.description: Inserts a new sales order or updates an existing one

post.summary: Batch insert or update sales orders
post.description: Inserts or updates multiple sales orders (up to 50 per request)
Cancels an existing sales order
Gets information on existing purchase orders with optional filtering

post.summary: Insert or update a purchase order
post.description: Inserts a purchase order or updates an existing one

post.summary: Batch insert or update purchase orders
post.description: Inserts or updates multiple purchase orders (up to 50 per request)
Cancels a pending or verified purchase order
Gets information on existing suppliers and clients
Inserts a supplier/client or updates an existing one
Deletes an existing supplier or client
Restores a previously deleted supplier or client
Gets information on existing inventory locations

post.summary: Insert or update an inventory location
post.description: Inserts or updates a current inventory location
Deletes a current inventory location
Gets information about stock on existing inventory locations
Inserts or updates information about stock on existing inventory locations
Updates product stock for given locations and products
Gets information on existing documents
Inserts a document or updates an existing one
Inserts or updates multiple documents in batch

apiKey.name: APIKEY
apiKey.description: Megaventory API key passed as a request body parameter or query parameter
